name: Bonfires Memory
description: Connects OpenClaw agents to Bonfires memory for context-aware retrieval, capture, and ingestion.

baseUrl.description: Bonfires API base URL. Env fallback: BONFIRES_BASE_URL.

apiKeyEnv.description: Name of the environment variable holding the Bonfires API key. Env fallback: BONFIRES_API_KEY_ENV.

bonfireId.description: Bonfire workspace ID. Env fallback: BONFIRE_ID.

agents.description: Mapping of local agent IDs to Bonfires agent IDs. At least one string mapping is required.

maxResults.description: Maximum number of search results to return per query.

throttleMinutes.description: Minimum interval between captures for the same session.

strictHostedMode.description: When true, plugin will throw if hosted API credentials are missing instead of falling back to mock client.

everyMinutes.description: Interval between ingestion scans in minutes.

rootDir.description: Root directory to scan for ingestion content.

ledgerPath.description: Path for the ingestion hash ledger. Relative paths resolved by plugin.

summaryPath.description: Path for the ingestion run summary. Relative paths resolved by plugin.

stateDir.description: Directory for plugin runtime state files (heartbeat state, capture ledger). Defaults to .bonfires-state/ within the plugin scope.
